meaning: adj.(说话、态度等) 粗暴的,生硬的,脾气坏的,(声音)粗哑的
examples: He picked up the phone expecting to hear the chairman's gruff voice.
His gruff exterior concealed one of the kindest hearts.
Beneath his gruff exterior, he's really very kind-hearted.
It was the precisely the kind of gruff, plain speaking that appeals to Australians.
So, when I came to the session as a mentor, I was gruff and dismissive.
